name: gated-plan-skills
description: Brainstorm a subjective topic into decisions with a meeting of models, or research an existing product with a simulated user panel into a cut/keep/improve report; plan the work as a checklist of small commits, then execute it phase-by-phase with each commit gated by an AI code-review loop until no P1/P2. Work is routed across a pool of model CLIs (glm/minimax/kimi/codex/cursor) by best value-for-money, scored to a central scoreboard, with Claude as native last resort.
